name: aftman
description: A toolchain manager, enabling project-specific command line tools

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: Creates a new aftman.toml file in the given directory

args.name: path
args.description: The folder to initialize the manifest file in. Defaults to the current directory

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Adds a new tool to Aftman and installs it

args.name: tool
args.description: What tool and version to install

args.name: alias
args.description: The name that will be used to run the tool

subcommands.name: install
subcommands.description: Install all tools listed in aftman.toml files based on your current directory

options.description: All tools will be installed, regardless of whether they are known

subcommands.name: self-install
subcommands.description: Installs Aftman, upgrades any references to Aftman, and adds aftman to your system PATH if supported

args.name: tool
args.description: The tool to mark as trusted
